steps.title: Use the two zeros
steps.content:
The graph passes through $(10,0)$ and $(-6,0)$, so the zeros are $10$ and $-6$. Therefore:
$f(x)=a(x-10)(x+6)$

steps.title: Find b in terms of a
Test the possible value
steps.content: Then $a+b=a-4a=-3a$. Choice D gives $a+b=-6$, so $-3a=-6$ and $a=2$. Since $2$ is an integer greater than $1$, this value is possible. The answer is D.
